name: agnipariksha
description: MCP server for the Agnipariksha PV module reliability test station. Exposes tools to inspect live measurements, start/stop IEC tests (TC, HF, LeTID, BDT, RCO, GCT), run LeTID analysis, detect anomalies in session data, and generate compliance reports.

AGNIPARIKSHA_BACKEND_URL.description: Base URL of the FastAPI backend. Defaults to http://localhost:8000.

tools.name: get_session_data
tools.description: Fetch the full data log for a completed or in-progress test session.

tools.name: get_live_measurement
tools.description: Get the most recent live V/I/P/T sample from the active test.

tools.name: start_test
tools.description: Start one of the 6 IEC tests (TC, HF, LeTID, BDT, RCO, GCT) with the given parameters.

tools.name: stop_test
tools.description: Stop the currently running test and turn the DC source output OFF.

tools.name: analyze_letid
tools.description: Compute IEC TS 63342 LeTID indicators (Idark = Isc - Imp at 75 °C) for a session.

tools.name: detect_anomalies
tools.description: Scan a session's V/I/T traces for out-of-band excursions and thermal runaway markers.

tools.name: generate_report
tools.description: Render a PDF / Markdown compliance report for the given session and IEC standard.
